name: superagent-deck-companion
description: Ghost-light Stream Deck Neo companion for SuperAgent

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/diagnose.ts src/preview.ts --format esm --clean --out-dir dist
scripts.bundle:mac: npm run build && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs macos
scripts.bundle:win: npm run build && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs windows
scripts.bundle:all: npm run build && node scripts/build-bundle.mjs macos windows
